programme.title: Major Crimes: Citizen's Arrest
programme.desc: In a case involving a kidnapping-turned-homicide, the squad is pressured to work quickly. Meanwhile, DNA evidence proves that Rusty has a close tie to the justice system.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: In Over Your Head
programme.desc: Jane is upset when a former colleague returns to the Boston Police Department.

programme.desc: In an exclusive prison interview, Timothy McVeigh himself describes how events in his personal life and the world around him inspired him to kill his fellow Americans. We also hear from survivors of the bombing and family members of the victims.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: Reconstructing the Crime Scene (Part 1)
programme.desc: On April 15th 2013, two bombs explode during the iconic Boston Marathon, killing three spectators and injuring hundreds others. In a race against time, investigators, using state of the art technology, circulate images to the public.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Boston Marathon: The Manhunt (Part 2)
programme.desc: With the Boston Bombing suspects identified as domestic terrorist brothers, the manhunt begins, a terrifying crime spree ensues, and new information sheds light on the heinous crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wind Farm Technician
programme.desc: Mike Rowe heads to an Oklahoma wind farm and learns that going green sometimes means you've got to get brown first.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory
programme.desc: Mike finds himself at the Windsorland Mobile Home Park where homes are being broken down to make room for a new shopping center, and then he heads off to Patina-V where he learns that making mannequins is not only a dirty job, but a form of art as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leech Trapper
programme.desc: Mike teams up with the boys from Bartos Bait & Fish to catch leeches that will later be sold for fish bait; then it's off to the Green Tripe factory in Hollister, CA where Mike helps make BARF (Biologically Appropriate Raw Food) for dogs.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sheep Castrator
programme.desc: Mike works at an automobile dealership where the job is sawing down a giant concrete wall to make room for a new washbay, then heads to a sheep farm where he tries his hand at sheep shearing & castrating before getting treated to Rocky Mountain Oysters.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Ice Salvage Crew
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty in Alaska as he helps protect the environment.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Aerial Tram Greaser
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs to help maintain and repair the tram 8,500 feet above ground.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dairy Cow Midwife
programme.desc: In Indiana, Mike learns how to milk, clean, and inseminate cows, and he delivers calves.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Floating Fish Factory
programme.desc: Mike travels to Alaska and explores how fish are prepared aboard a processing ship.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Jobs of the Big Apple
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty in the Big Apple after climbing atop a building to clean the water tower.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Maggot Farmer
programme.desc: Mike travels to Congress, Arizona, to try his hand at moving a giant cactus before a storm comes in. Then Mike heads to Idaho where he visits a special kind of farm, one that raises maggots.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A House Divided
programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins
programme.desc: Amy decides to have a real wedding ceremony because if she gets approved for surgery, she's afraid she may not survive. After the wedding, the sisters head to Atlanta hoping for a life-changing final weigh-in.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Lipoma Whisperer
programme.desc: Melissa has spent years trying to cover a huge lipoma with a sweatshirt. Tyler's cancer fears have prevented him from having his huge head lumps examined. Tahj is plagued by painful boils. Amber has ear keloids that can no longer be ignored.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Leave It to Nevus
programme.desc: With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Monica has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. Jackie has a melon-sized lump on the back of her shoulder. Reginald has large, rare growths on the back of his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Big Pop on Campus
programme.desc: Dr. Lee is tasked with helping Reginald remove a large growth on his head. Then, Che'RE has a prominent bump on her place and Juan has boils on the back of his neck.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Mo Toes, Mo Problems
programme.desc: A man with an enormous lump on his foot creates a mystery for Dr. Vincent. Dr. Schaeffer faces a case of a wart cluster that is all over a man's foot and patient Kiara has the first double big toe the doctor has ever come face-to-face with.

programme.desc: Three couples, where the men are hot and the women are obese, endure strain on their relationships and attempt to overcome adversity.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Ghosts of the Past
programme.desc: Mayhem ensues when Chris and Joy set a wedding date and Joy attempts to befriend her future mother-in-law. Rusty makes an insane effort to interfere with Kristin's bariatric goals.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Morticia Addams in a Good Way
programme.desc: Designer Hayley Paige drops in to help a bride who wants to look like a creepy fairy to match her skull centrepieces on her wedding day. With more than 150 discarded dresses, Rachael is a bride with a penchant for pickiness.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Don't Show the Goodies
programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: Unpolished: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Bria's engagement dreams with Matthew turn into a nightmare at her party. Then, she has to collaborate with Lexi on an important client who has a unique request for a music video. Lexi's feelings about Bria's fiancé may drive them apart.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Inseparable
programme.desc: Carmen and Lupita are conjoined twins with distinct personalities sharing not only their body but also every moment of their young adult lives. They face challenges as they fight for their independence and prepare to tackle college life away from home.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Death on the Coq
programme.desc: The winter is off to a bad start when a major blizzard slams the Coquihalla Highway. Jamie Davis' heavy rescue team spends the morning clearing semis off the road when word comes that a multi-vehicle pile-up has closed down both northbound lanes.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Where's My Rotator?
programme.desc: Last year, Jamie ordered a state-of-the-art heavy rescue truck called a Rotator, but the busy winter season is here and the custom-built wrecker still hasn't been delivered. Jamie heads to the factory in Tennessee to bring it home himself.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: It's Stormy Everywhere
programme.desc: Jamie's having second thoughts about bringing his son Brandon on-board; right-hand man Kevin shows up at a wreck without the gear he needs to control traffic and Jamie's one bright spot is his brand-new truck, the Rotator.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Roughing Up the Rookie
programme.desc: To keep up with a busy season, Jamie hires on a new guy who turns out to be to a slow learner, and then goes AWOL during a major blizzard.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: The Avalanche Zone

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Yin and Yang

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: After The Crash

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Family Business
programme.desc: The crew tackles their toughest recovery so far this season when they have to pull a smashed SUV up a sheer 400-metre cliff; Jamie offers stepson Brandon a chance to drive his own tow truck but needs to teach the teenager how to drive standard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Movie: Yes Man

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened

programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Fonzie Scheme

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Day After the Day After

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Predator Strikes
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte defend against predator attack. Atz Lee and Jane catch lake trout on Lake Louise. Atz R. renovates his floating homestead. Eve does more work while Eivin recovers from a broken rib.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Roll Yuletide Roll
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane help a fellow homesteader. Atz Sr. looks for a place to anchor his floating homestead. Otto, Eivin, and Levi rebuild a homestead hot tub. Charlotte protects her herd from predators.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Beach Is Burning
programme.desc: Otto and Eivin fight to douse a raging coal seam fire on Kilcher beach. Atz Sr. attempts the most unconventional bear hunt of his life. Jane and Charlotte take a girl's day adventure clamming.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Range Danger
programme.desc: Otto makes a calf caboose for his spring cattle drive. Atz Lee and Jane bring sustainable power to their remote cabin. Atz Sr. builds a smoker to preserve meat. Levi renovates his childhood cabin.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Stretched Thin
programme.desc: The Kilchers struggle to navigate a new normal amid a growing pandemic. They must find ways to cope when resources grow thin, homeschooling becomes more than they bargained for, and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Kraftsmanship
programme.desc: The Kilchers reveal how their own brand of ingenuity has allowed them to survive in the wild.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Officers' Cut: Welcome to New Hampshire
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas responds to a black bear cub wreaking havoc in a small community. Officer Chris McKee carefully handles baby skunks that have been separated from their mother. And Officer Kevin Bronson patrols for ATVs going dangerously fast.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Stretched Thin
programme.desc: The Kilchers struggle to navigate a new normal amid a growing pandemic. They must find ways to cope when resources grow thin, homeschooling becomes more than they bargained for, and Atz Lee's PTSD resurfaces.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Predator Strikes
programme.desc: Otto and Charlotte defend against predator attack. Atz Lee and Jane catch lake trout on Lake Louise. Atz R. renovates his floating homestead. Eve does more work while Eivin recovers from a broken rib.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Roll Yuletide Roll
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Jane help a fellow homesteader. Atz Sr. looks for a place to anchor his floating homestead. Otto, Eivin, and Levi rebuild a homestead hot tub. Charlotte protects her herd from predators.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Overcoming Obstacles
programme.desc: Injured elephant, Man-Jai, desperately needs emergency tusk surgery, while a massive clean-up operation begins for a family of hippos. A bent beak jeopardizes a couple of lovebird penguins, and a strange resident gets VIP treatment.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Malu's Way or the Highway
programme.desc: The games begin for keepers when orangutan Malu destroys his playroom. An elderly horse must undergo a risky procedure, and keepers must decide if it's time to say goodbye to one of the zoo's most beloved giraffes.

programme.title: Mega Zoo: Navigating a New Normal
programme.desc: In order to navigate the COVID-19 global pandemic, the staff must ensure proper care for their animals. Keepers spring into action when urgent dental surgery is needed for elderly tiger Binjai, and a family of cotton top tamarin monkeys must be relocated.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Subterranean Paradise
programme.desc: Firefighter Ricky rescued a 20-foot Burmese python from a burning building, and now he needs Antonio's help. In one if his most ambitious projects, Antonio transforms the basement into an epic habitat with heated rock facades, a waterfall and pond.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Ultimate Manimal Cave
programme.desc: Antonio transforms a cluttered basement housing more than 20 rescued reptiles, mammals and birds into an underground grotto. The team build enclosures into artificial rock walls for the exotic residents and create an entertainment space everyone can use.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: A Backyard to Drool For
programme.desc: Antonio and team transform a health-hazard yard into a dog-friendly escape, complete with paw-operated drinking fountain and medicinal plants. Inside, a bathroom is transformed into a dog wash and a drool-proof feeding station solves a sticky problem.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Fluffy Fixer Pupper
programme.desc: A family needs help creating a multi-functional space for the bunnies, ferrets, cats and dogs that have taken over their home. Antonio designs elaborate hatches, ramps and tunnels allowing the animals to be in the same room, but remain safely separated.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dragons' Den
programme.desc: Antonio meets a family with two bearded dragons stuck in a tank in mom's bedroom. Antonio's solution: a backyard, temperature-controlled dragon clubhouse with separate self-sustaining tanks, a common climbing area, and a cool hangout spot for the family.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Cat Build Gone Wild
programme.desc: A couple wants their Savannah cat and foster kittens to safely enjoy the outdoors. Antonio's solution is an intricate system of outdoor catwalks and double-decker enclosures with cat-friendly plants, natural climbing surfaces and all the toys a cat needs.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Tricked Out Cat Castle
programme.desc: Designer Antonio Ballatore and team build a tricked-out, cats-only treehouse.

programme.title: Movie: House Party
programme.desc: Despite his father's wishes, an urban teenager schemes to attend his friend's party.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Martin: Swing Thing
programme.desc: The Paynes are invited to attend a Christmas party, given by some influential people.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Gina and Pam witness a bank robbery and go into hiding.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: All You Can Eat

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Last Call
programme.desc: Friends in New Orleans hit the town looking for a night of fun. But by sunrise, one of them is found dead in the trunk of a burned-out car. No one escapes suspicion, but it's the victim's own words that eventually help bring down her killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: During a cold Minneapolis winter, a night out with good friends takes a dark turn when one of them disappears. Days later, when human remains are discovered, investigators travel a chilling path to catch a killer before another night ends in murder.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Acting On Evil
programme.desc: After a Wisconsin cast party, a mother makes an unimaginable discovery. Suddenly, a close circle of friends is under suspicion for murder. As detectives work quickly to unravel this mystery, another vicious attack may lead them to their killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Inside Job
programme.desc: In Hamburg, NY, employees at the local Toys 'R' Us are faced with the unthinkable when one of their own is savagely killed during an otherwise typical nightshift. Suddenly, every co-worker is a suspect, but is one masking as a murderer?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Movie: Sicario: Day of the Soldado
programme.desc: When it's discovered that Mexican drug cartels are helping terrorists get into the United States, two agents are sent to the country to turn the major cartels against each other, but when the plan's cover is blown one of the agents goes rogue.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIV

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Dark Times Ahead
programme.desc: Chip and Agnes are ready to embark on an autumn moose hunt, and Erik has ordered powerful new traps with the hopes of catching a valuable fox if he can set the traps safely.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Calling the Wild
programme.desc: The daily tests continue for six Alaskans living in the state's most remote corners.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: To make ends meet, Andy and Kate teach subsistence and survival skills. Cody Allen has ventured into the bush from Oregon to learn how live off the land from the experts.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Thin Ice
programme.desc: The warm weather has resulted in a late freeze that is wreaking havoc for the tough Alaskans.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Return to the Wild
programme.desc: Glenn is back, returning to his remote camp after months away. With grizzlies active in the area, he doesn't know what he'll be walking into.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Playboy Playmates
programme.desc: Playboy founder Hugh Hefner's girlfriend, Miss November 2010 Shera Bechard, moved in to the Mansion with her Chihuahua mix, Willa, who needs Cesar's help to stop bullying Hef's 2-year-old King Charles spaniel Charlie.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Daytona Dogs

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hollywood Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps exercise guru Jillian Michaels and TV star Kelsey Grammer get a handle on their dogs to maintain their happy households.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bad Dogs of Comedy
programme.desc: Cesar helps a group of hilarious comedians face their toughest critics: their own pets. Featured funny guys include Skyler Stone, Ralphie May, Lahna Turner and Paul Rodriguez.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Kelly and Hyrum Lai always knew their picture-perfect life together would include a dog, but early on their Lab puppy Holly began displaying disturbing behaviour.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Amazing Dr. Brenda
programme.desc: After a long week of treating sick bunnies, horses and dogs, Dr. Brenda and the ladies head out for a night of fun.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Here's Looking at Moo
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his family are very much a part of their community. In honor of his dedication, Dr. Pol is surprised with an award in recognition of his work with 4H Club.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-tergeist
programme.desc: Halloween is coming and Dr. Pol is in his element dealing with jumping, flailing and barking clientele.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Grizzly Battleground
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, or any darker than Alaska in winter.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Underground Worlds
programme.desc: Underground bunkers and subterranean labyrinths entomb dark secrets of the past waiting to be discovered. Experts investigate the mysteries of these astonishing feats of engineering to uncover how they were constructed and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Into the Murder Labyrinth
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth once used by a secret police force could warp the mind and turn friend into foe.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secret Aliens
programme.desc: An astronomer records an unusual radio signal from beyond our solar system. FBI agents find classified documents at the home of a NASA scientist. When scientists discover strange DNA in the octopus, they examine if their origins could be alien.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Stonehenge on Mars
programme.desc: When NASA spots a something on Mars that resembles Stonehenge, they investigate what could have made this strange structure. Scientists discover a mysterious hole in Saturn's rings. An ancient tribe claims contact with alien visitors.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Law and Murder
programme.desc: A double murder involving the family of a federal judge will lead the FBI, US Marshals and Chicago PD on an investigation of epic proportions. But when law enforcement finds the end of the trail, they learn the death count may climb higher.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Sandra Garner
programme.desc: '48 Hours' gives viewers a rare look inside a murder case where the investigation unfolds on camera, from virtually everything from the first moments through the verdict are captured.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: Ring of Truth
programme.desc: Demetra Smith is living in marital bliss with her new husband, but her happiness is cut short when her stepdaughter finds her shot execution style in her bed. Nicole Redlinger and the elite detectives at Atlanta Homicide set out to find her killer.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Flowers on the Road
programme.desc: Two lost souls unlucky in love, Frank and Angelina Rodriguez, have found soulmates in each other. But in September 2000, a sudden death leads investigators to uncover a shocking tale of how one person's compulsion can turn into murder.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Blood Is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: When the bond between twin brothers proves stronger than the one between a husband and wife, true love takes a tragic, deadly turn.

programme.desc: Seventeen-year- Taylor Behl has only been away at college in Richmond, Virginia for two weeks when she goes missing without a trace. Her diaries point to several possible suspects in what eventually becomes an alarming homicide investigation.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Unfinished Business

programme.desc: When a man calls 911 screaming for help but too terrified to give his address, police scramble to find him. As detectives investigate, they uncover a shocking tale of torture and revenge one that proves that unrequited love can be deadly.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Big Sky Murder
programme.desc: A frantic woman calls 911 when she finds her husband shot to death. The investigation reveals allegations of harassment from the victim's ex-lover and eventually uncovers a complex trail of deceit, in a murder that was years in the making.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Down by the River
programme.desc: In a harrowing call, a terrified woman tries to give police clues: there's a gun, she's near a river, and her kids are at risk. After police find her body in the river, they learn a stomach-churning truth about a killer who's been a predator for years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hitman 4 Hire
programme.desc: Leslie and Brian Long live in an affluent suburban of St. Clairsville, Ohio with their two beautiful kids. When Leslie goes online to make business contacts, the family is besieged with mysterious threats, and Bryan is almost killed by an unknown gunman.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Flirting with the Enemy
programme.desc: College freshman Jason Rodriguez finds excitement in his newfound freedom online when he begins dating several girls who pique his interest. But soon after meeting one of them offline, he turns up dead and the identity of his online friends are revealed.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love Goes South
programme.desc: Lonely musician Ray Merrill thinks he's found his dream woman in Brazil through an online dating website. But as the exotic romance heats up, money starts to go missing.

programme.title: Diabolical: Evil Sister Act
programme.desc: When Samuel Johnson Jr. suddenly vanishes, San Antonio investigators find themselves face-to-face with two sisters who know something. Through a series of interrogations, they reveal an elaborate murder plot meticulously engineered by a puppeteer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Masters to the Rescue
programme.desc: In the lush woods of Manchester, Maine sits 97 acres of pristine land that was recently inherited by Gary and his wife Ellen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Pilsbury Family Rafting Cabin
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned Maine cabins. They give these forlorn properties the facelift they've needed for decades. You never know what you might find when you go for a walk.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cob Cottage
programme.desc: After years of apprenticing, Sonia is putting her skills to the test by building her first house: an off-grid cob cottage on top of an Oregon mountain. Her lack of experience and the Pacific Northwest's rainy season could wash away her dreams.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Classics I: Spinach Salad
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown examines spinach salad recipes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Corn the Beef
programme.desc: Alton makes traditional corned beef that would rival any New York City deli.

programme.title: The Making of Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, Chip and Joanna transform a historic gristmill into the stunning home of Joanna's new cooking show.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: A Family Tradition
programme.desc: Joanna shares a cherished family favorite, Grandpa Stevens' classic Lebanese dish, fatayer, served with a Lebanese salad, hummus and baklava for dessert. After finishing up, Joanna surprises her dad with the leftovers of his favorite meal.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines: A Friendsgiving Feast
programme.desc: Joanna shares one of her favorite meals to make as the seasons change, a rich and delicious Friendsgiving casserole, cranberry sauce, green beans amandine and cherry almond crisp for dessert.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Detroit
programme.desc: Andrew heads to the Motor City to grab a slice of Detroit-style pizza, line up for a Coney Island dog and chili fries, fill up on timeless Middle Eastern classics and dine at a Detroit institution in the making.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lancaster County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates Lancaster County, PA, where farm-to-table dining isn't a trend - it's tradition! Local favorites include pork and sauerkraut, soft pretzels, scrapple, sticky buns and shoofly pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Tears of the Jolly Beetle
programme.desc: When Captain Man loses his powers of invulnerability, he becomes too afraid to fight crime. It is up to Kid Danger to keep Swellview safe and figure out how to restore Captain Man's powers.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Birthday Girl Down
programme.desc: Henry is not invited to a birthday party because he was wrongfully accused of throwing the birthday girl off the roof the previous year.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Parents Just Don't Thunderstand
programme.desc: Frustrated by the family's rules, Phoebe and Max use one of his devices to make Hank and Barb act like teenagers - but the responsibility of now having to be the parents makes the teenagers regret their actions.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Shred It Go
programme.desc: Phoebe freaks out when she thinks her concert tickets were destroyed in the paper shredder, but really Max has stolen them so he can take his crush to the show.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Phoebs Will Rock You
programme.desc: Phoebe tries to turn herself into a bad girl to appeal to Max's new best friend, a bad boy rocker who is the key member of Max's new band.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Danger Force Awakens
programme.desc: Captain Man has a new crew of superhero sidekicks, Danger Force, but when he tells them there's a 'crime drought' in Swellview, they begin to suspect that he's fighting crime without them.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Imaginary Friend
programme.desc: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Jerk of All Trades/ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Timmy gets Jorgen fired and helps him find a new job. Sparky makes his own magic dog treats. Crocker tires to buy one million of them in order to make a wish.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's 2D House of Horror/ It's a Wishful Life
programme.desc: A lava flow threatens Vicky's house; Timmy wishes he was never born.

programme.title: The Loud House: Left in the Dark/ Get the Message
programme.desc: Lincoln races his siblings to the couch in order to watch his favourite TV show. Lincoln must delete an angry voicemail from Lori's phone so she doesn't hear it.

programme.title: The Loud House: Heavy Meddle/ Making the Case
programme.desc: After being picked on, Lincoln regrets telling his sisters to stay out of his business. When a video contest opens at school, Lincoln decides to record his sisters embarrassing themselves.

programme.title: The Loud House: Driving Miss Hazy/ No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their babysitter.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Sweet Spot/ A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to obtain a prime seat for the family's roadtrip. Lincoln acts more mature in order to eat at the adult table.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Loud House: Project Loud House/ In Tents Debate
programme.desc: Lincoln must help his sisters get ready faster so they don't miss the bus. Lincoln ends up being the swing vote on where family vacation takes place.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mutiny on the Krusty/ The Whole Tooth
programme.desc: When a storm sweeps the Krusty Krab away, its crew and customers need Krabs to lead them home. Patrick's last baby tooth needs to come out, but he's afraid to let it go.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Krabby Patty Song
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sings a song about a frozen Krabby Patty.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dash/ Took
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chaperone/ Employee of the Month
programme.desc: SpongeBob agrees to take Mr. Krab's daughter to the prom; Bob and Squidward battle it out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Musclebob Buffpants/ Squidward, the Unfriendly Ghost
programme.desc: Squidward pretends to be a ghost to get Patrick and Spongebob to leave him in peace.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jellyfish Hunter
programme.desc: When money hungry Mr. Krabs discovers that customers love Spongebob's special jellyfish jelly Krabby Patty, he convinces Spongebob to bring him as many of the jellyfish as he can.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Arrgh!/ Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Bob and Pat convince Mr. Krabs to play Treasure Hunt; Bob hops on the wrong bus.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Your Shoe's Untied/ Squid's Day Off
programme.desc: Pat doesn't know how to tie the laces on his new shoes; Mr. Krabs take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Big Pink Loser/ Bubble Buddy
programme.desc: Patrick takes SpongeBob on as his role model; SpongeBob feels lonely when Pat's out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Double Trouble/ Liar Liar
programme.desc: Alvin sneaks into Simon's lab and accidentally clones himself; Alvin tells a small lie that quickly turns into a huge disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Music Box/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Theodore gives the Principal a music box he found in Dave's desk to cheer her up. Theodore's been mistakenly mailed off in a box, so Alvin and Simon have to get him back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Munk vs. Machine/ Shack Magic
programme.desc: The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete in a dodgeball tournament but no-one expects Theo to be their secret weapon.The Chipmunks find a shack that magically fills with toys and games and wonder if it's magic or something more sinister.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hard Copy/ Parent Hoods
programme.desc: Wanda leaves Timmy a magic photocopier; Timmy meets a couple who look like his parents.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Brobot/ The Big Pinch
programme.desc: Jimmy constructs the perfect little brother; Jimmy brings Thomas Edison to the present.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Granny Baby / Time Is Money
programme.desc: Jimmy's Granny comes to stay while Judy and Hugh are away; Jimmy's investment tip has unintended consequences.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sick As A Chipmunk/ Instant Gram
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Adventures in Babysitting/ Alvin's Assistant
programme.desc: Theodore gets roped into doing Alvin's babysitting job with a spoiled four year old. Kevin agrees to be Alvin's assistant to get closer to the music industry, but ends up running errands instead.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Best in Shoe/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: To land the lead role in a play, Alvin wagers Brittany that he can remain in character as a shoe cobbler. When Brittany becomes convinced she's a long lost princess she carries her new royal status a little too far.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Invasion of the Squirrelanoids
programme.desc: While tracking mutagen, the Turtles bring a mutated squirrel back to the lair. When it starts multiplying, the Turtles must hunt the squirrel mutants and prevent them escaping into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutagen Man Unleashed
programme.desc: Donatello obsessively experiments with mutagen in a bid to find a cure for April's mutated father. Unfortunately this puts April in danger from a new threat-Mutagen Man.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: End of the Road
programme.desc: Zoey tries to convince Coral Harbor to switch from cars to Morph-X bikes, and Blaze executes an evil plan.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Digital Deception
programme.desc: Ravi is shocked by the evil Roxy when she comes to his rescue, leaving him to wonder if there's still some good left in her.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Origami Tsunami/ Donnie’s Gifts
programme.desc: Our wannabe heroes try to solve the biggest little problem in the city. The Turtles have to fight their bad habits and a mutant chef.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Bully Code/ Finding Mary McGuffin
programme.desc: Dad accidentally sells Candace's favorite childhood doll, Mary McGuffin, to Dr. Doofenshmirtz. Baljeet asks for Phineas and Ferb's help when Buford starts to drive him nuts.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry the Actorpus/ Bullseye!
programme.desc: When Perry wins a contest and becomes the spokesanimal for Totally Tools, his secret identity is put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tri-Stone Area/ Doof Dynasty
programme.desc: It's the Stone Age and Phineas and Ferb are cavemen who decide to invent something new, fun and useful, the wheel. In ancient feudal China, Princess Isabella is part ruler and Master Perry has given up the way of the warrior.

programme.title: The Office: After Hours
programme.desc: Andy makes everyone in the office stay late in order to cover for those who went to Florida.

programme.title: The Office: Test the Store
programme.desc: Dwight prepares a theatrical presentation to impress Nellie at the Sabre Store opening.

programme.title: The Office: The Last Day in Florida
programme.desc: Jim tries to save Dwight from being fired after Robert California reveals that he hates Nellie's business plan. Meanwhile, Andy learns that Erin isn't coming back to Scranton.

programme.title: The Office: Get the Girl
programme.desc: Andy makes a life-altering decision and drives across the country to pursue Erin. Meanwhile, Nellie shows up in Scranton and tries to claim the manager position.

programme.title: The Office: Welcome Party
programme.desc: When Robert makes the office throw a welcome party for Nellie, the party planners try to sabotage it. Meanwhile, Andy and Erin practice how Andy will break up with Jessica.

programme.title: The Office: Angry Andy
programme.desc: Andy returns from his romantic quest to find his manhood in jeopardy. As he and Nellie duke it out over the manager's chair, his co-workers offer advice on how to perform.

programme.title: The Office: Fundraiser
programme.desc: An unemployed Andy crashes a fundraiser for the Senator and winds up adopting 12 disabled dogs.

programme.title: The Office: Turf War
programme.desc: When Robert drunkenly shuts down a nearby branch, Jim and Dwight join forces to outsmart a salesman from Scranton's uglier sister city.

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio
programme.desc: A stolen diaper leads to a high-speed car chase. With help from an old boss, Andy goes undercover as a janitor and stages a takeover.

programme.title: The Office: New Guys
programme.desc: Jim and Dwight are thrown off balance by the arrival of two young employees. Andy comes back from leadership training with a desire for vengeance against Nellie.

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding
programme.desc: The wedding toast of Pam's ex fiancé Roy causes Pam and Jim to examine their relationship for buried secrets.

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry
programme.desc: Andy learns he is related to Michelle Obama and flaunts his bloodlines.

programme.title: South Park: Krazy Kripples
programme.desc: Believing that people who are born disabled are better than those who are disabled through an accident, Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the 'Crips.'

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom Is Still a Dirty Slut
programme.desc: The boys and most of the town wait for Dr. Mephesto to regain consciousness and reveal the identity of Cartman's father.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: Cripple Fight
programme.desc: Big Gay Al returns to South Park as the new scout leader. When he is fired for being gay, the boys rally to his defence with the help of the new 'handi-capable' kid, Jimmy.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: It Hits the Fan
programme.desc: When the HBC Network allows a show to utter curse words on the air, it threatens to destroy the world. It's up to the Knights of Standards and Practices, as well as Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny, to censor the airwaves and save the world.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of Chef
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman are thrilled to have their old friend back when the town is jolted by Chef's sudden reappearance. The boys soon notice that Chef is acting different and his strange behaviour begins to get him in serious trouble.

programme.title: South Park: Obama Wins!
programme.desc: There's something in Cartman's bedroom that may change the Presidential election outcome.

programme.title: South Park: Lil' Crime Stoppers
programme.desc: After they return a missing doll to a little girl, the Park County Police Department recognizes the boys' efforts and names them Junior Deputies.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Killer in High Heels
programme.desc: Maura becomes the key suspect in a homicide case when her date turns up dead and Maura can't remember the evening. Jane struggles between protecting her friend and doing her job.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Dance With the Devil
programme.desc: Maura and Jane unravel a shocking secret about Paddy and Hope that affects them all. Korsak opens up about Cavanaugh's tragic past.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: But I Am a Good Girl
programme.desc: TJ's christening turns grim when a body is discovered in the church. Jane almost abuses her power in order to protect Tommy when Lydia's fiancé threatens to take custody of TJ.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Somebody's Watching Me
programme.desc: A viral video of Jane's bad day potentially jeopardizes her career and reputation. Meanwhile, the squad rushes to solve a puzzling murder case involving a conspiracy theorist.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: All for One
programme.desc: A popular high school teacher is killed in a hit and run that is clearly no accident. The squad works to solve the case, but Jane is preoccupied with Lt. Martinez's apparent favouritism towards his own drug unit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: Frankie Jr. is brought in to help with a gruesome murder case involving a youth hockey league. Frustrated with Hope, Cailin asks to stay with Maura but quickly learns that living with a teenager requires skills she does not have.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: No One Mourns the Wicked
programme.desc: Jane faces her memories when she and Maura present the case of serial killer Charles Hoyt at a symposium. As they begin their simulation of the investigation, a horrifying discovery leads to a game of cat and mouse with a new serial killer.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Built for Speed
programme.desc: A late night drag race turns deadly and the squad works quickly to solve the case. Jane suspects that the motive for murder may have been an attempt to conceal drug trafficking, but Lt. Martinez seems to be thwarting her investigation.
