programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: New Year, New You
programme.desc: How to improve your smile with Invisalign; supplements to fuel your body & protein you actually enjoy taking; Quick Bytes with Ralph Pagano--Plant-based; tools to help you reach your health & wellness goals; how to develop your child's reading skills.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Shake Your Groove Thing
programme.desc: Meredith thinks she made a mistake in surgery; Alex has a patient addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: If Tomorrow Never Comes
programme.desc: Derek chooses Meredith to assist with a surgery, but Bailey disapproves of their relationship.

programme.title: The Closer: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A prominent doctor is murdered in his office while administering an important drug test.

programme.title: The Closer: Fantasy Date
programme.desc: A congresswoman's daughter is murdered and clues lead to her shocking sexual activities online involving a fantasy 'rape.'

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Shame Game
programme.desc: Major Crimes struggles to keep important documents from leaking. A situation proves extremely uncomfortable for Capt. Raydor, when the Department of Children and Family Services tracks down Rusty's biological father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Dismissed With Prejudice
programme.desc: When a murder conviction is overturned after eight years, Tao is forced to question his past actions. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to be himself during his first outing with his father.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cheaters Never Prosper
programme.desc: A man from Las Vegas is found dead after an apparent overdose but the facts become unclear as details begin to unfold. Meanwhile, a series of strange events leave Rusty and Raydor wondering if Dunn can be trusted.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cold as Ice
programme.desc: Frankie Jr. is brought in to help with a gruesome murder case involving a youth hockey league. Frustrated with Hope, Cailin asks to stay with Maura but quickly learns that living with a teenager requires skills she does not have.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder in Paris
programme.desc: Newlyweds are murdered in a small town in Illinois and a local barfly is quickly sent to death row for the crime.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Family Lies
programme.desc: After a family of six is found brutally murdered in a rural Texas town, a perpetrator confesses to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Bombs and Betrayal
programme.desc: Tucson, Arizona society is blown away when a car bomb explodes outside of an exclusive country club, but when the case goes cold, will investigators be able to find their suspect?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Bad Cop
programme.desc: A former police officer stalked, assaulted, and attempted to seduce young women and was arrested while looking for sex with minor girls on internet chatrooms. He serves time but flees while out on parole.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: No Way Out
programme.desc: Authorities and the family of a young girl do not believe her when she tells them that she is being raped by her stepfather. A grudge fight escalates until one man shoots the other with three friends as witnesses.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Enemy Next Door
programme.desc: Kevin Patrick Stoeser is caught looking at lewd pictures in a halfway house following his release. Knowing this will put him back behind bars, he flees and has been on the run ever since.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Factory of Death
programme.desc: After blackmailing his Southern California employers about their illegal employment practices, an undocumented factory worker vanishes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Three women a day are killed by a former or current husband or boyfriend. Nicole Beverly is desperately trying to avoid that fate. Chris Cuomo goes inside the epidemic of intimate partner violence that turns lethal for so many women.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: High Proof Cherry Bounce
programme.desc: Legal and outlaw distillers compete to make a 300-year-old spirit called Cherry Bounce, a favorite drink of George Washington, nearly lost to time. Josh Owens, whose family kept the recipe alive for generations in the backwoods, joins as guest judge.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Backwoods Is Booming
programme.desc: Mark and Digger deploy an old-world innovation to bring their barrel-aged reserves to market, while Tim attempts to make Tickle's CBD moonshine on a commercial scale. Josh puts himself at the mercy of the mountains' greatest peril: a rookie shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: No Ordinary Run
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws unleash a 700-gallon run on a whisper-quiet steamer still. Mark and Huck traverse Appalachia's roughest terrain to run liquor with moonshine legend Jim Tom. Mike and Jerry engineer a high-tech solution to a backwoods problem.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Single Malt Moonshine
programme.desc: With bonus scenes and added features: Mark and Digger's compassionate plan backfires and Tim finds a new way to make single-malt shine. Later, Mike learns Jerry isn't doing his part.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt oatmeal raisin shine for a high-flying Nashville customer. Mike and Jerry find themselves under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time shiners deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Patrol and Protect: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Burn
programme.desc: It's the first weeks of shine season, and outlaws are eager to turn a profit before the cops close in. Josh and Bill try to get a head start at a heritage shine site but their first run leaves a bitter taste. Jeff and Lance scope out the competition.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Overproof and Under the Gun
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt oatmeal raisin shine for a high-flying Nashville customer. Mike and Jerry find themselves under the gun when they overdeliver on proof to a biker gang. Mark and Huck forge a lifeline to old-time shiners deep in the mountains.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Absinthe Makes the Heart Grow Fonder
programme.desc: Tim and his help struggling owners of Missouri Ridge Distillery in hopes of turning it from problem to profit. Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Patrol and Protect: Marshland Massacre
programme.desc: A slew of poached birds is discovered on an abandoned boat, changing a missing person's search into a hunt for a hiding poacher. Game Wardens Mike Boone and Lauren Iles rescue a tangled 12-foot gator, while multiple boats are inspected on Lake Limestone.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Whiskey Burn
programme.desc: It's the first weeks of shine season, and outlaws are eager to turn a profit before the cops close in. Josh and Bill try to get a head start at a heritage shine site but their first run leaves a bitter taste. Jeff and Lance scope out the competition.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Life in the Extreme
programme.desc: It's late fall and the Browns kickstart their ambitious cabin build. Bam and Gabe go on a deer hunt as the family scrambles to pull off an 'extreme' wedding on the mountain, but days before the ceremony, things take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Rumble in the Bush
programme.desc: Gabe is attacked by an aggressive ostrich and loses one of his most prized possessions in the process. When the ranch gets hit with the first snowfall, the family builds a big bonfire to unfreeze the ground under their house site.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: As winter winds down, the Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday celebration for Baby Eli. Pushing through the pandemic, the Browns complete the main house just before a massive wildfire strikes the mountain.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: What it Takes
programme.desc: Billionaire Glenn Stearns provides insight on what makes a great entrepreneur, how to build a successful business and the importance of the American dream.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Can't Stop, Won't Stop
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns reveals how he pursued his dream of growing a business to a $1-million valuation in just 90 days despite hitting a breaking point that sent him to the hospital.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Gambling on Success
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns provides real-life examples of how to fund a successful business, including a gamble that proved to be his biggest money-making scheme yet.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Staying Alive
programme.desc: After nearly losing his startup funds, Glenn Stearns digs deep to expand his new businesses and shares what it takes to keep the dream alive.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Moment of Doubt
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia plan to get couples tattoos, but Ethan isn't sure he's ready. Kim and Barry miss their son Joshua and hope to bridge the gap with the older kids. Max and Moriah hang out as 'just friends' but can't deny their feelings for each other.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: The Open Road
programme.desc: Lydia confides in Kim about her secret crush. Ethan jets off to Los Angeles to meet up with Olivia for a much-needed vacation away from Cairo, Georgia. Then, Lydia is in for some surprises when she joins Moriah for a girls' night.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Everything
programme.desc: Ethan and Olivia continue their California adventure and veer into an unexpected tantric experience. Kim, Barry, Micah, Moriah and the younger children unite for a tender remembrance of their late son and brother, Joshua.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in the Time of Corona
programme.desc: To keep boredom at bay during the summer quarantine, the kids rope Trent and Amber into viral video challenges. It's great family fun, but the cabin fever is putting a cramp in Trent and Amber's bedroom life, so they decide to try a pole dancing class.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: The Buddy System
programme.desc: Wary of being alone in Charlotte, Whitney convinces Buddy to move in with her. With Buddy's new girlfriend taking up his time, however, she finds herself lonelier than ever.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: I Came to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: After a long period of no contact, Ethan decides to confront his parents. Kim makes an unexpected confession that leaves Moriah speechless. Micah signs a modeling contract while Moriah records music in a studio.

programme.title: Unpolished: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Long Island nail artist Lexi Martone shares everything that happened with her family and their salon last season. From wild nail requests to a marriage proposal and the resurfacing of an explosive family secret, it was quite a year for the Martones.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: What's Cooking, Good Looking?
programme.desc: Trent and Amber meet with an intimacy coach to spice things up, and a cooking competition inspires Alex to improve his culinary skills. Jonah's girlfriend Ashley visits from Asheville, and Anna teaches new tricks to her main man -- the family dog Cruiser.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: The Buddy System
programme.desc: Wary of being alone in Charlotte, Whitney convinces Buddy to move in with her. With Buddy's new girlfriend taking up his time, however, she finds herself lonelier than ever.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: I Came to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: After a long period of no contact, Ethan decides to confront his parents. Kim makes an unexpected confession that leaves Moriah speechless. Micah signs a modeling contract while Moriah records music in a studio.

programme.title: Unpolished: Catch Up Special
programme.desc: Long Island nail artist Lexi Martone shares everything that happened with her family and their salon last season. From wild nail requests to a marriage proposal and the resurfacing of an explosive family secret, it was quite a year for the Martones.

programme.title: Hot & Heavy: Heavily Ever After?
programme.desc: Joy and Chris' wedding may be derailed with both Chris' mom and best friend expressing concerns. Adrianna faces her high school bully in an effort to gain confidence.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Mom Is Pulling Strings up There!
programme.desc: Randy heads to the desert to give Lindsey an unforgettable Mothers' Day surprise. Also, Jazmin's shopping with her trio of protective brothers and Lyndzie's afraid her dress won't fit.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bionic Bride
programme.desc: Crystal and her sisters have some severe sibling rivalry. Will she be able to rise above it to find the perfect dress? Rebekah is known as the bionic model because of her prosthetic arm. Randy makes it his mission to find her a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That's How You Dress a Lady
programme.desc: Randy's runway show is finally here and it's his big opportunity to prove he's back as a bridal designer for good.

programme.title: Unpolished: Through Thick and Thin
programme.desc: An upcoming surgery bring the family together in a time of turmoil. Lexi's client has an interesting request for a portrait of her dead pet. Then, the Martone women head into the big city for a nail polish event where Lexi is an honoured guest.

programme.title: Unpolished: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: The Martone ladies make a splash while shopping for Bria's wedding dress. At the salon, the sisters collaborate on a client who wants to be transformed into an alien goddess. Later, Lexi is pushed to reveal her real issues with Bria's fiancé.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer?
programme.desc: Topping 1,000 lbs., Mayra Rosales is accused of murdering her nephew. During the three-year trial, a nationwide debate erupted over whether or not an obese person can get away with murder.

programme.title: Half-Ton Killer: Transformed
programme.desc: Mayra Rosales was one of the heaviest women in the world, embattled in one of the most publicized murder trials in history. Since her acquittal, she has begun a long journey: countless surgeries and hours of physical therapy for her second chance at life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley T's Story
programme.desc: Ashley is 24 and lives alone. Her only sources of comfort are food and the relationships she has online. But not a single one of her profiles is real. Soon, Ashley learns that Dr. Now isn't someone she can lie to like her online friends.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Holly's Story
programme.desc: Holly already has one failed weight loss surgery, so to succeed this time, she must do more than change her eating habits, she must address the childhood issues that continue to plague her.

programme.title: Movie: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: A magazine columnist has a very unusual assignment and a quick deadline. She has to write a firsthand account of all the things women do to inadvertently drive men away and she's got to do it in 10 days. Now she's on a mission to find the right guy.

programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Human Piñata

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Browbeaten

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Early Thanksgiving Episode
programme.desc: The guys put their culinary skills to the test by serving dishes the viewers requested. Plus, find out if Joe grew a mustache.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Soup's On Episode

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field

programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: The crew takes on the challenge of bringing the jungle to life in a suburban backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Deeper Dive: Epic River Oasis
programme.desc: A family living in a bird sanctuary asks Lucas to transform their outdated, rundown backyard into a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis. Later, Lucas makes a Florida family's dream a reality when he builds his first lazy river.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Ultimate Builds: World's Greatest
programme.desc: Discover France's fantastical structures that redefine what a treehouse can be. In Scandinavia, explore a treetop bed and breakfast, experience nature at a forester's custom homes, and see how the Arctic Circle's sky-high Treehouse Hotel stays afloat.

programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Back Road Bait
programme.desc: It's snapper season on the Gulf, and as fishermen catch fish, game wardens catch fishermen who are breaking the law. Two men are investigated for cruelty to a wild pig, a jet ski collision leads to arguments, and an exotic tortoise finds a new home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Shrimp and Run
programme.desc: For Texas game wardens, the unexpected is all part of the routine. A shrimp boat tries to make a run for it. One warden makes some furry friends. A simple trespass warning turns into a trip to jail. A warden helps a woman spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Release the Hounds
programme.desc: Everything in the Pacific Northwest is bigger, including the K-9 units who need to be able to match forces with the resident bears when they need to be driven away from populated areas for their own safety.

programme.title: Northwest Law: The Clam Scam
programme.desc: Washington's Fish and Game police put themselves in harm's way to protect all forms of wildlife, from dangerous dumpster diving bears needing to be relocated to cagey clam poachers.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Salmon Stakeout
programme.desc: The fish and wildlife officers of Washington State are busting poachers by sea that are illegally fishing for salmon, and saving stranded and distressed wildlife as a deer becomes trapped and disoriented.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Canadian Crabber Bust
programme.desc: It's an international incident when the fish and wildlife officers of Washington State bust poachers coming in from north of the border.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Bear Baiter Bust
programme.desc: An officer comes upon what appears to be an illegal bear baiting station set up by a poacher and he'll use the suspects own hunting technology to make the bust.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Drunk and Disorderly

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Baptism By Fire
programme.desc: Audrey and son Anthony are taking on their first flip together in Woodland Hills. When a devastating fire rips through the house halfway through the project, it threatens to burn up their potential profit as well.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: That New Flipper Smell
programme.desc: A 19 year old ignores his family's pleas to go to college to start his real estate investment career. An investor agreed to let him take lead on a flip, and Tarek must coach him to be fearless when facing an $80,000 renovation.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Horrible Hoarder House
programme.desc: Alison and Mondo are amateur flippers who have not only taken on the worst house on the block, but the worst house Tarek has ever seen.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Broken Slab to Totally Fab
programme.desc: A couple is tired of mediocre profits and asks Tarek to help with their next flip in Anaheim, CA. Even with his guidance, they struggle to make the right decisions and face an uphill battle when the local market starts to buck.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: The Craziest Ceiling in Compton
programme.desc: A couple that flipped a home with Tarek in the past must call on him again after buying a home with stalactites on the ceilings and competition nearby. When Tarek learns they didn't call the city about permits, he doubts whether the project can be saved.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Dancing With Disaster
programme.desc: Patricia and Legacy are professional dancers turned house flippers and a high-end project in Brentwood has them seeing dollar signs. Their hideously expensive loan and a major foundation problem threaten to ruin this flip from the start.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Failing to Plan Is Planning to Fail
programme.desc: Lidia and Fernando are putting all their savings on the line to flip their first home in Rancho Cucamonga. She's a dreamer obsessed with expensive design. He is so neurotic about losing money, he's trying to skimp everywhere he can.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Bad Energy BoHo
programme.desc: Tarek mentors real estate novices to help them learn the secrets of a successful flip.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Style vs. Substance

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: A Flipping Family Nightmare
programme.desc: Junes and his mom share a dream of building a family flipping business, but this flip in Long Beach is quickly becoming a nightmare. Blaming each other for mistakes and losing money, they disagree on who should be doing what.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Ice Mummy

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of the Sunken Cities
programme.desc: Ancient civilizations buried underwater for centuries hold answers to a mysterious and unexplained past; using cutting-edge archaeological methods and pioneering radar technology, experts investigate these sunken empires and the secrets of their remains.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Atlantis
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange island in the Mediterranean might offer new clues in the hunt for Atlantis. Using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts reveal the apocalyptic event that destroyed this long-lost civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: American Stonehenge
programme.desc: Investigating the mysterious pattern of rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. At the notorious Alcatraz prison, Rob uses state-of-the-art technology in search of rumored escape tunnels.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Hidden Doomsday
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: An elderly couple are found murdered in their home. At first it's believed to be a robbery-gone-wrong until detectives realize it may me a family member with a grudge.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Model Home Murders
programme.desc: Between her upcoming wedding, a new home, and a thriving real estate career, it looks like everything in Lori Brown's life is headed in the right direction. But one fateful Monday afternoon, her life takes an unforeseeable and tragic turn.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Love on the Rocks
programme.desc: In Montrose, Colorado, rock quarry owner and mother, Irene Trujillo, suddenly goes missing. When her daughter's search for their mom comes up empty, 911 is called. Those closest to Irene, including her employees, are suspected of foul play.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Desert Drifter
programme.desc: Three teenage boys looking for adventure in the peaceful and secluded high desert of California's Indian Creek run into a drifter with a mission to kill.

programme.title: Disappeared: Edge of Fourteen
programme.desc: Ashley Summers is a fun-loving 14-year-old. When she vanishes on July 4th, her family is at a loss. The mystery deepens when the FBI connects her case to two other young women missing from her neighborhood. Ten years later, there's still no answer.

programme.title: Disappeared: Wrong Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: A feisty trucking company manager vanishes from her Florida home without a trace of violence. Her purse is later found near the lair of a serial killer.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Luck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Kansas City, MO, 1960: When Patricia Jones' bullet-ridden body turns up by the side of lovers' lane, Detective Browning forges ahead on a catch me if you can trail from Missouri to Mexico, taunted by the sly smiles of his provocative arch nemesis.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Beast with a Badge
programme.desc: A detective struggles to exonerate his friend, a black former cop, from rape allegations pinned on him by the LAPD's all-white brass. He'll navigate entrenched racism, lead a stake-out and employ the magic of Hollywood to ensnare the real predator.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Newlydeads
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1968: Cheryl Perveler is found in her yellow sports car bleeding out from a gunshot wound to the head. When investigators dig into Cheryl's life, the plot that they uncover will defy even the most outlandish expectations.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Decoding a Murder
programme.desc: It was a case that haunted Lancaster, Pennsylvania: the 1992 murder of teacher Christy Mirack. More than two decades later, a new breed of detective would help break the case, using DNA in a whole new way. And unmasking a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A woman's exclusive and emotional conversation with her adoptive father, Donald Robinson, who discusses his belief at the time that her adoption was legitimate and learning about his brother's horrific crimes.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: In the Dead of Night
programme.desc: In Rison, Arkansas, a young woman is abducted from her home in the middle of the night. When investigators ultimately dig up her body in the woods, they uncover a horrible murder plot that led to the victim's gruesome demise.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Mother's Love
programme.desc: In the suburbs of Atlanta, Georgia, a pregnant mother and her fiancé are kidnapped on the night before their baby shower. When the fiancé's family receives ransom calls shortly after, there's no mistake that the couple's lives are hanging by a thread.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Tanks
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest tanks in history.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Mountain Home
programme.desc: A man turns his dreams into reality with a spacious, solar-powered dovetail log cabin made from trees harvested off his 100-acre woods.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Windy Mountain
programme.desc: A snowmobile guide and his wife build an off-the-grid cabin by the river and mountains of their beautiful home state of Wyoming. The build includes a 272 square foot cabin with a small shop and garage. The team faces many challenges including snow.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Faulty Foundation
programme.desc: A bachelor's dark dining and living room are opened up and become one modern lounge. What was once dirty-carpeted living room with college dorm furniture and a separate ugly dining room gets completely transformed into one hip wine room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bugs, Birds and Bad Plumbing
programme.desc: Moving to the interior of the Dollar House, host and interior designer Nicole Curtis demolishes her heart out and focuses on the disgusting kitchen space as well as adding a half bathroom to the first floor, evicting a few pigeons along the way.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Mantle to Remember
programme.desc: Restoring the first floor of the Dollar House continues as host and designer Nicole Curtis uncovers hardwood floors throughout the living and dining room areas. The dining room hutch is still intact, but there is a whole new fireplace mantle to build.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Rebuild
programme.desc: Heading up to the second floor, Nicole takes on the bathroom, one of the house's dirtiest and grimiest rooms. She brings it down to the studs, adding clean lines with white subway tile and re-purposes an old dresser into one of her signature vanities.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: A Case of Shingles
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his team get on top of a bad roof that has plagued a family for 40 years. The damage Mike uncovers proves they have been coping with leaks for nearly half a century.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Below Board
programme.desc: Mike Holmes discovers that a house that looks good on the outside is hiding a rotting secret just below the surface, and now it’s a problem that threatens an entire neighbourhood.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Five BBQ Chicken Favorites
programme.desc: Roger Mooking has plucked his way through plenty of barbecue chicken, but only the very best birds make this list of his top five favourites.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing for Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Manhattan
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall goes head to head against long-time rival Brian Shaw, pulling a 23-ton truck and attempting the notorious skyscraper 'Monster' sandwich from Sarge's Deli.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Dallas-Fort Worth
programme.desc: It's High Noon in cowboy country for Eddie Hall, as he takes on a monster pancake challenge, a painful rodeo test and local delicacy calves' testes in the world's largest Honky Tonk venue.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco
programme.desc: Adam devours a Mission Style Super Burrito, ginormous sandwiches, and a two-gallon monster sundae.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut

programme.desc: Remy gets featured in Edgar's latest 'Weekly Weirdness' episode. When Boris volunteers to chaperone Vee's nature walk field trip, she hypes up his spookiness, only to be let down.

programme.title: Toon Bops: The Potbelly Pig Song
programme.desc: The adventures of a mischievous potbelly pig popping up all over town to dance with his friend Boy.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Bluey: Teasing/ Shaun/ Daddy Robot
programme.desc: Bluey teases Bingo; Bluey and Bingo ask Dad to get a pet; Dad puts Bluey and Bingo to bed.

programme.title: Bluey: Grannies / Yoga Ball / Calypso
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have a question for their Nana; Mum teaches Bingo how to use her bark; Bluey and her friends learn from their teacher, Calypso.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: To the Library! / ARF's Birthday
programme.desc: When Bob discovers he lost a library book, the Pugs race out on a mission to get it before it’s due. The Pugs go on a last minute mission for party supplies for ARF’s birthday.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mission to the Moon / Say Cheese
programme.desc: A baby wolf longs to see the moon, so Pip and Freddy embark on a mission to make her dream come true. During photo day, JP entrusts a photo-ready Lucky to Pip and Freddy’s care.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Purrfect Little Helper/ The Colorful Chameleon
programme.desc: When Pip and Freddy have to deliver a kitten, they think it's a mistake since there are no cats at T.O.T.S. The Junior Fliers must deliver a baby chameleon that keeps disappearing!

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Chilly Gets Chilly/ Through the Reading Glasses
programme.desc: Chilly can't wait to go outside after a snowfall, having never actually been in snow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Scuba-Doggies/ Walking the Bob
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on an underwater adventure to retrieve a lost package. After a visit to the eye doctor, it's up to the pups to lead a blurry-eyed Bob home.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Henry the Man-Beast
programme.desc: Henry's got a big date, but things don't go quite as planned after he's accidentally exposed to a strange device in the Man Cave.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Spoiler Alert
programme.desc: Henry and Ray have to deal with an especially annoying new villain, the Spoiler. Piper is pushed to her limits as she tries to join a popular Captain Man fan club.

programme.title: Henry Danger: My Phony Valentine
programme.desc: When Henry's crush goes on a Valentine's date with someone else, Schoz provides an android to make her jealous. Ray has an unpleasant date with one of Henry's teachers.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Mall Time Crooks
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max turn a simple trip to the mall to pick up Hank's birthday gift into fighting, chaos, and a run-in with security that threatens to derail their dad's birthday.

programme.title: The Thundermans: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Max tries to win an epic fail video contest by submitting a fail video of Phoebe as she practices ballet. When Phoebe learns of his plan, she refuses to cooperate, and Max goes to desperate measures to get the footage he needs.

programme.title: The Thundermans: The Neverfriending Story
programme.desc: Phoebe and Max worry they will be stuck hanging out together all the time when their friends start to spend time with each other. The twins go to great lengths to make sure that they all have a bad experience at the movies.

programme.title: Danger Force: Say My Name
programme.desc: The members of Danger Force are given terrible nicknames live on KLVY news, so they come up with a plan to announce to the world who they really are - Volt, AWOL, ShoutOut, and Brainstorm.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Speechless
programme.desc: The kids help Myles plan Yasmine's big dinner at the house for her boss. While Myles struggles to write a speech in honor of his wife, the kids throw out the catered food and plan their own menu.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Where's Wanda/ Imaginary Gary
programme.desc: Timmy tracks down a missing godparent; Timmy's imaginary friend comes to life.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Fair Bears/ Return of the L.O.S.E.R.S
programme.desc: Chloe wishes that the fair bears would come to life. Timmy's enemies find out he is vulnerable without his fairies.

programme.title: The Loud House: Sound of Silence/ Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-cancelling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night.

programme.title: The Loud House: Picture Perfect/ Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the "perfect" family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House: Linc or Swim/ Changing the Baby
programme.desc: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

programme.title: The Loud House: Overnight Success/ Ties that Bind
programme.desc: Lincoln invites Clyde to a sleepover, but gets jealous when Clyde wants to hang out with his sisters. After eavesdropping on his parents, Lincoln thinks they have decided to get rid of their kids.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hand-Me-Downer/ Sleuth or Consequences
programme.desc: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Food Con Castaways/ Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. Later SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wormy/ Patty Hype
programme.desc: The gang thinks that Sandy's pet caterpillar has been consumed by a 'monster' butterfly; Bob markets his coloured crabcakes to the Krusty Krab's clientele.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: It's Pony: Annieversary/ Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Annie wonders why Pony is celebrating. And, Pony gets to go to school after being named class pet.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fry Cook Games
programme.desc: Krabs enters SpongeBob in the athletic competition called the Fry Cook Games. SpongeBob is thrilled and starts to train hard. When Pat wants to train as well, SpongeBob tells him you have to be a fry cook to compete.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky/ Mermaidman and Barnacleboy II
programme.desc: Patrick and SpongeBob ignore warnings; SpongeBob follows superheroes for a day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaid/ Gary Takes a Bath
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Free Rides/ I'm Your Biggest Fanatic
programme.desc: Spongebob attempts and fails his driving test again; Bob tries to join a special club.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Cabin in the Kelp/ The Hankering
programme.desc: The Gal Pals spend the weekend in a cabin in the woods.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pirates Life/ World Record
programme.desc: When pirates show up at the house, the boys do all they can to protect a treasure chest that arrived for Dave. The Chipmunks and Chipettes compete to set a world record in hopes of winning a new virtual reality game.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Granny Awards/ Sick Day
programme.desc: Dave is thrilled when he thinks he's nominated for a Grammy, but it's actually an award for aging musicians. Alvin and Kevin pretend to be sick to miss school and sneak off to the Dagarack Convention.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Who's Your Daddy/ Homewrecker
programme.desc: Dad can't attend a Squirrelly Scout Festival; Vicky frames Timmy for destroying his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: Battle of the Bands/ Jimmy on Ice
programme.desc: Jimmy, Carl and Sheen form a band to beat out Cindy and Libby in a talent contest.

programme.title: The Adventures of Jimmy Neutron: Boy Genius: I Dream of Jimmy/ Raise the Oozy Scab
programme.desc: Carl loses sleep over a recurring nightmare; Jimmy and Cindy collaborate on a project.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: A dim-witted dog is recruited into a super-secret crime-fighting organization.

programme.title: Back at the Barnyard
programme.desc: Otis and his friends have adventures while trying to protect the farm they live on.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: You Troll/ Life of the Party
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Big Bro Theodore/ No Putts, No Glory
programme.desc: When Theodore mistakenly thinks he's the oldest brother, he tries to be a better role model for Alvin and Simon.Alvin tricks Theodore into believing he's great at mini golf which backfires when Theo signs up for a tournament.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simon Sleeps/ Fireworks School
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mikey Gets Shellacne
programme.desc: Michelangelo is tired of being the 'runt of the litter.' But when he fools around with some mutagen, he gets a dangerous infection that is mutating out of control.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Target: April O'Neil
programme.desc: April tries to resume a normal teenage life, but when Karai starts hunting her again, April realizes she may have put her new friend Casey Jones in danger as well.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Taking Care of Business
programme.desc: Devon finds it difficult to balance a new job he took to impress his dad and the duties of being the Red Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Hangar Heist
programme.desc: Nate uses a captured Gigadrone to develop new technology, and Devon struggles with trusting his team.

programme.desc: The Turtles help April throw a not-so-happy birthday party. An anchor man turned mutant-worm used to report the news, now he's making headline.
