programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Crane's Day Off
programme.desc: When Frasier comes down with the flu, he is reluctant to let Gil fill in for him for fear of losing his timeslot. Despite sending Niles to fill in for him, a delirious Frasier decides to rush down to the station to reclaim his show.

programme.title: Frasier: My Coffee With Niles
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles meet at Café Nervosa to discuss the one-year anniversary of Frasier's move to Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier: Slow Tango in South Seattle
programme.desc: An old friend writes a book about how Frasier lost his virginity with his piano teacher.

programme.title: Frasier: The Unkindest Cut of All
programme.desc: When Eddie impregnates a neighbour's dog, it is decided that Eddie must be neutered. Martin's reluctance forces Frasier to take Eddie to the vet himself, and the dog ends up running away.

programme.title: Frasier: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Frasier sets up a date for Daphne with Tom, the new station manager. But Tom, who is gay, mistakenly believes that he has a date with Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Flour Child
programme.desc: Niles contemplates the responsibilities of fatherhood after witnessing a cab driver go into labour. To simulate the experience of having a child in his life, he takes to carrying a sack of flour around Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier: Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier can't bring themselves to inform Martin that they're investors in the group that is planning to tear down Martin's favourite bar.

programme.title: Frasier: The Botched Language of Cranes
programme.desc: Frasier causes a major rumpus when he advises a depressed caller to move out of Seattle. Facing pressure from the station management, he tries to make amends but manages to put his foot in his mouth every time.

programme.title: Reba: Brock's Swan Song
programme.desc: Brock decides to spread his father's ashes on the golf course where his father died.

programme.title: Reba: The Story of a Divorce
programme.desc: When Reba receives her final divorce papers, Lori Ann persuades her to start dating again.

programme.title: Reba: You May Kick the Bride
programme.desc: Reba tries to persuade Brock's doubting bride, Barbra Jean, to continue with the wedding.

programme.title: Reba: Vanny Dearest
programme.desc: Reba tries to persuade Van's parents to mend their relationship with their son.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Mayim Bialik and Meagan Good stop by, Ken Wingard and Kym Douglas guest host.

programme.title: Movie: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former 'Most Eligible Bachelor' how to dance for his extravagant, society wedding. But as the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between them.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: The Cissy
programme.desc: Randy is harboring a giant secret and the pressure is getting to him. Meanwhile, Cartman calls Stan a cissy.

programme.title: South Park: Insecurity
programme.desc: Cartman signs up for a home security system.

programme.title: South Park: Raising the Bar
programme.desc: Cartman realizes that he's fat, so he decides to get a mobility scooter.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Cancelled
programme.desc: Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny find out that planet Earth is just one big intergalactic reality show and it's about to be cancelled.

programme.title: South Park: Freak Strike
programme.desc: When the boys learn that talk shows offer prizes to people who are grossly disfigured they can't sign Butters up fast enough.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Turd Burglars
programme.desc: Kyle’s mom has a fecal transplant and the boys are on a quest for the best microbiome.

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy's looks from cutest to ugliest. The boys steal the list, but are unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park: Eat, Pray, Queef
programme.desc: Someone plays an April Fool's joke on the boys and it doesn't go over well. Meanwhile, Terrance and Phillip are disgusted by their new co-stars' antics.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Clubhouses
programme.desc: Stan and Kyle are psyched to have Wendy and Bebe visit their clubhouse for a game of 'Truth or Dare,' but first they have to build one. When they won't let Carman join, he and Kenny build their own clubhouse and invite teenage girls to play with them.

programme.title: South Park: Tom's Rhinoplasty
programme.desc: While Mr. Garrison deserts the class for a visit to Tom's Rhinoplasty, Stan, Kyle, Kenny, and Cartman all try to become lesbians to get the attention of Ms. Ellen, the new substitute teacher.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: The Hobbit
programme.desc: When Wendy tries to fix one of her girl friends up with Butters, she ends up in the counsellor’s office.

programme.title: South Park: Tonsil Trouble
programme.desc: After a routine tonsillectomy goes horribly wrong, Cartman comes face to face with his own mortality.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Timmy! 2000
programme.desc: When Timmy is diagnosed with Attention Deficit Disorder, it triggers a wave of prescription drug abuse at South Park Elementary. With all the spare time he has now, Timmy joins a rock band as the lead singer.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Child Abduction Is Not Funny
programme.desc: In an effort to protect their children from kidnappers, the parents hire the owner of City Wok Restaurant to build the Great Wall of South Park. During the construction he is harrassed by Mongolians intent on breaking down the City Wall.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Judge, Jury and Executioner
programme.desc: A mock trial adviser dies tragically during a competition. Meanwhile, Angela's increased interest in selling brownies has Jane concerned that she may be hiding financial issues, and Tommy hires a lawyer to settle his claim.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Designing Spaces: Keeping Your Home Productive
programme.desc: Inspiring viewers to take on all home improvement challenges and decorating dilemmas.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Self-Destruct Button
programme.desc: Derek and Meredith spend a night together; George thinks an anaesthesiologist is drinking.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Save Me
programme.desc: Alex treats Devo, a patient whose religious beliefs jeopardize her chances for recovery.

programme.title: The Closer: You Are Here
programme.desc: Brenda turns to an autistic teenager for help in solving the murder of his father, a prominent judge.

programme.title: The Closer: Batter Up
programme.desc: Detectives investigate an attack on a gay man, who was beaten to death with a baseball bat while at a bar with his partner.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Long Shot
programme.desc: When a peaceful ceremony turns deadly, Major Crimes and the FBI team up to track down a dangerous sniper. Meanwhile, Raydor negotiates a deal that even Provenza can get behind.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Final Cut
programme.desc: The squad scrambles to garner a confession when the pregnant wife of a film director is found murdered. Meanwhile, just as things seem to fall into place under Raydor's leadership, new Deputy D.A. challenges Raydor's intentions as Rusty's guardian.

programme.title: Major Crimes: False Pretenses
programme.desc: A murder-suicide case has the department reeling. Meanwhile, Rusty receives a threatening letter and Emma demands that he be relocated and Raydor is forced to consider the request.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: The squad rushes to solve a violent homicide case muddied by conflicting evidence. Maura is burdened with the major decision of whether to take in her recently paroled grandfather.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: The Killer Twins
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo tries to find answers to the age-old question of nature versus nurture, asking if the desire to kill could be a genetic trait.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 1)
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson tells Chris Cuomo her terrifying encounter with serial killer Andrew Urdiales. Even though she spent years telling people her story, not even her own mother believed her until Urdiales confessed to several other crimes.

programme.title: Inside Evil With Chris Cuomo: Confessions of a Serial Killer (Part 2)
programme.desc: Chris Cuomo conducts the last interview serial killer Andrew Urdiales will ever give.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: When a bomb explodes in a home, police believe it was an act of revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Til Death Do Us Part

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Fatal Love Triangle
programme.desc: A teen rivalry turns deadly when Rachel Wade and Sarah Ludemann both fall in love with charismatic bad boy Josh Camacho.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: When Rhoni Reuter, the pregnant girlfriend of Chicago Bears legend Shaun Gayle, is shot to death in her home, investigators are faced with a long list of romantic rivals as suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Critical Fail
programme.desc: Glenn and his team have to rally to save their business and their livelihoods after a critical deal falls through and pressure mounts.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Save the Business Model!
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns shows how the successful entrepreneur rallies despite the entire business model being in jeopardy.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Taking the Reins
programme.desc: Glenn takes on the role of entrepreneurial leader when his team's plan goes up in flames just before their big debut and first chance to cash in.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Building An Empire: Moment of Truth
programme.desc: Glenn Stearns learns the outcome of his most recent venture: a barbecue restaurant that was taken from concept to completion in just 90 days.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Mystery at Blind Frog Ranch: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Duane Ollinger believes there's a fortune of gold buried beneath his property in Utah, Blind Frog Ranch. But even though the land seems to be fighting him at every turn, he's not going to stop until he gets his hands on the gold, whatever the cost.

programme.title: BattleBots: The Tournament

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Last Bot Standing
programme.desc: It's championship night and just four bots remain to face off in the ultimate battles to decide the 2018 BattleBots World Champion.

programme.title: BattleBots: Eyes on the Prize
programme.desc: The second half of the tournament kicks off with the most elite bots in history facing off for the coveted trophy, and in the Main Event, undefeated bots Whiplash and Witch Doctor look to end an enemy's hot streak.

programme.title: BattleBots: Are You Yeti to Rumble?
programme.desc: Fan favourites Yeti and Witch Doctor face off in a world-class fight as top competitors battle to earn their spot in the post-season tournament.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Duck Only A Mother Could Love
programme.desc: Elite bots Tombstone and Sawblaze go to war in the BattleBox, as the competition heats up to become the 2019 BattleBots champion.

programme.title: BattleBots: A Family Affair
programme.desc: The stakes get higher when teams on the brink start to feel the heat, and as the clash continues, undefeated bots Son of Whyachi and the Ewerts look to continue their reign of terror.

programme.title: BattleBots: There's No Tapping Out In BattleBots!
programme.desc: Reigning champion Tombstone takes on the legendary Gigabyte as the battles heat up to take home the renowned BattleBots trophy.

programme.title: BattleBots: Just Keep Spinning
programme.desc: A brutal match-up between Icewave and Yeti ignites the Battlebox, while the best bots in the world flex their gears.

programme.title: BattleBots: It's a Flippin' Robot Party!
programme.desc: World-class robots Bronco and Bombshell go head-to-head as the elite group of robots compete for the title of 2018 BattleBots World Champion.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gina's Story

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Blunder Years
programme.desc: The guys try to justify getting humiliated at a convenience store, they give conflicting info about their event planning companies at a wedding expo, and the loser awkwardly meets his celebrity childhood crush: Danica McKellar.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother-in-Loss
programme.desc: The guys get cheeky with interviewers while explaining their lackluster resumes at a job interview. And how mad was Sal when Murr legally married his sister in tonight's unholy punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Big Uneasy
programme.desc: The guys take over New Orleans, stealing sips from strangers' drinks at a famous bar, and spinning the Wheel of Voo-Doom on Bourbon Street. Then, tonight's loser turns into a legendary swamp monster.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Jokers Playhouse
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to discover how hard it is to keep a straight face as the guys act out bizarre scenes to throw each other off their game.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Elevating the Game
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys take over the register at a burger joint. Plus, find out how they pulled off Sal's secret elevator punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Puncture Perfect
programme.desc: The guys have to complete a series of bizarre tasks at a video game store. Plus, tonight's punishment cuts deep for the big loser in a painful test of friendship.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of TP
programme.desc: Find out why so many early-season challenges happened in a mall, how the team hid the cameras, and what Sal said that became an instant classic. Plus, what the crew considers to be one of the first iconic moments of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Who Arted
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers wore Bluetooth earpieces for a challenge, how the crew finds focus group participants and why the punishment shoot was almost canceled.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Compromised Agent

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Single Shop Showdown
programme.desc: Four chefs are given one chance to shop for all three rounds without knowing what they'll be asked to make.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All Pyramid
programme.desc: Four courageous chefs are determined to reach the top playing three twisted rounds of the Food Pyramid! First, the Pyramid picks the equipment, produce and total ingredient weight for their updated classics.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Family Food Feud: Part 2
programme.desc: It's a family affair in Flavortown when two restaurant-owning families compete for a chance at a $20,000 shopping spree. Each round, the families must choose one member to compete in a challenge that will earn a key advantage in the next round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Kitchen Heroes
programme.desc: Charity is important at Flavortown Market, where most of the unused food is donated to local food shelters after each competition. With that in mind, Guy Fieri decides to showcase chefs who are giving back to their own communities every day.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Scratch Chef Showdown
programme.desc: In a world of convenience food, four scratch chefs show Guy Fieri what happens when convenience goes out the window. They have to make each component in their dishes entirely from scratch, like bread for their soup-and-sandwich combo.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: Pantry-Palooza
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri turn three GGG judges into competitors in their own kitchens. They send each one a box of ingredients for a lumberjack breakfast and a grocery list of extra items to shop for in their own cupboards.

programme.title: Kitchen Crash: Getting Stuffed in Jersey
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro brings three chefs to Paramus, N.J., to convince homeowners to hand over food from their kitchens. With those ingredients, the competitors are challenged to serve festival-style food, something 'stuffed' and street-fair dishes.

programme.desc: Ray begins to feel insecure about his own looks when Debra tells Robert he's attractive.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Car

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Diamonds
programme.desc: When Ray discovers that the diamond in Debra's ring is a fake, he finds a way to steal it.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Game
programme.desc: When the Barones play a game of 'Scruples,' they find themselves arguing about honesty.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Weird Science
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray move Erica into college where her roommate is also named Erica. Later, Beverly has a hard time letting go and ends up sleeping over in the dorm, much to Erica's dismay.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Hogan Is My Grandfather
programme.desc: Adam is assigned a term paper on a great person in history, and he decides to make a movie about his grandfather but finds all of Pop's war stories mundane. Pops takes matters into his own hands and decides to tell more exciting stories.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Faith Off
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard has been hired to remodel 'meanie mom Lindsay's bathroom, she can't help but intervene and make sure he doesn't screw up the job and risk their reputation at Ritchie's school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: My Big Fat Sober Wedding
programme.desc: Christine's attempt to stay sober at a friend's wedding doesn't keep her from blurting out a secret.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Friends

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Frasier
programme.desc: Christine realizes that one reckless evening may have jeopardized her chance to begin dating Mr. Harris.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Manhunt
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas races to the scene of an ATV accident. When a home is broken into, Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett assist police in tracking the suspect. Officer Bob Mancini tries to save the life of an injured loon.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided
programme.desc: Officer Hannett is tested trying to capture an injured goose. Officer Lucas is the first responder on scene for a drug overdose. And Officer MacFadzen must climb 40 feet into the treetops to deal with an aggressive hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: During a busy weekend on the trails, a group of ATV speedsters must be handled, while a suspicious bear kill is investigated. On Lake Winnipesaukee, a gang of kite skiers are confronted and an illegal firesled and a vandalized bob-house is found.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: During a busy weekend on the trails, a group of ATV speedsters must be handled, while a suspicious bear kill is investigated. On Lake Winnipesaukee, a gang of kite skiers are confronted and an illegal firesled and a vandalized bob-house is found.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Moose Chase
programme.desc: With the arrival of fall comes the great Maine moose season. Warden MacCabe goes on a six day hunt and takes you along for the ride. Also, wardens investigate a double moose kill, one of the worst wildlife crimes there is.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Warden vs. Wild
programme.desc: In the final weeks of moose season, not everyone is following the rules. The wardens investigate a family suspected of killing and wasting a moose. Blanchard and Christianson have to stop an illegally harvested moose from crossing the border.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Deer Detectives
programme.desc: Maine's busy deer hunting season keeps the wardens on their toes. An intentional violator in Aroostook County is busted night hunting. A hunter misidentifies his target and shoots an antlerless deer and feuding neighbors hamper the wardens' investigation.

programme.title: North Woods Law: To Serve and Protect
programme.desc: The game wardens are guardians of Maine's wildlife, but they also protect the public. Warden Carter must find an injured bear. A search is mounted for a missing man in the woods. Wardens MacCabe and Stevens track down hunters.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Giraffe Road Trip
programme.desc: The family prepares Croc One, Steve Irwin's research ship, for a mission to release an endangered sea turtle back to the wild. Scarlett the Giraffe is reunited with her grandmother, and Grub the wild Echidna is released from the Zoo's Wildlife Hospital.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Bindi's Lemur Island
programme.desc: The Australia Zoo's Alligator Snapping Turtles need a health check, and it's Robert's job to protect from their fierce bites. Terri and Bindi welcome seven new Lemurs from the US. The Zoo's Rescue Unit is called to save possums caught in a chimney.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk
programme.desc: Mkhaya, the youngest baby elephant in the Safari Park herd, learns to use her trunk. Will Alba the Andean bear become a first-time mom? Zoo vets examine Mandazzi the gorilla, and Jeff the snake chaser looks for he elusive costal patch nose snake.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.desc: A military family that's used to moving with little notice receives his latest post orders. They hope to find a forever home in Georgia where they can settle down when he retires in six years.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Hearts of the Home

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Khanda
programme.desc: The competition piles on as our bladesmiths are asked to forge a weapon in their signature style from a large pile of mixed metal that is welded together. Only two will return home to forge the mysterious khanda, a legendary blade from ancient India.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Yatagan
programme.desc: The smiths must transform the rusted steel of a 1971 Mercury Cougar into their signature blade within three hours. Two smiths remain and must return to their home forges to craft the elite military Yatagan within the span of five days.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Landsknecht Sword
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are floored when they must craft a signature blade from a massive piece of elevator cable. The final two competitors return home to recreate a sword wielded by some of history's fiercest soldiers: the two-handed Landsknecht sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Astronaut Knife
programme.desc: On the 50th anniversary of the first steps on the moon, four blade smiths compete to recreate a space-age M-1 NASA survival knife out of ball bearings. In the third round the finalists construct a spiked mace.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Japanese Ono
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging a blade that must fit perfectly into a puzzle piece cut out. After two puzzling rounds, the final two smiths return home to recreate the ancient samurai pole axe, the Japanese Ono.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Massive Maguro Bocho
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with forging a cleaver using steel from meat hooks. After two rounds, two smiths forge the Maguro Bocho, a massive tuna knife.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Legendary Sword of Saladin
programme.desc: Four smiths are in for a twist when they're asked to forge signature blades using either a suspension cable or a piano wire. After intense testing, two smiths are asked to make the legendary Sword of Saladin.

programme.desc: While Booker and Tess team up to plan their sixth grade dance, Nia worries her dancing skills aren't good enough for the big event. Meanwhile, Raven starts to question if she's being a good mom and goes overboard trying to volunteer for the kids' school.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Twin-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Twin sisters Liv and Maddie finally reunite when Liv returns to Wisconsin after spending the last four years starring in a hit musical television show in Hollywood. The Rooney sisters quickly realize their polar opposite personalities.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Team-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie becomes captain of the girls’ basketball team just as the team's fundings gets cut.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Bearer of Dad News
programme.desc: When Raven has a vision of Booker and Nia being upset over their Dad's move, she goes overboard trying to do all of the fun activities Devon normally did with the kids.

programme.title: Raven's Home: You're Gonna Get It
programme.desc: When Nia sneaks to school wearing makeup against Raven's wishes, she draws the attention of the 8th grade girls who invite her to hang out.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lake Rancid
programme.desc: When a magazine contacts Destiny to do a story on her community service, Matteo, Gwen, and Finn help her clean only one area of the shore, hiding the rest of the trash.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: You've Got Female
programme.desc: Sydney organizes a school protest about being more inclusive of women. Young Max befriends a skater girl, but is conflicted because the Dog Boys don't allow girls in their crew.

programme.title: Jessie: The Princess and the Pea Brain
programme.desc: Fairy tales come alive when Jessie and Zuri read a bedtime story that places the gang in medieval times. Jessie is excited and Tony is jealous when Brody asks her on a date.

programme.title: Jessie: Star Wars
programme.desc: Jessie helps host teen movie star Jordan Taylor who is staying at the Ross' house.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Slammed
programme.desc: When Booker becomes responsible for choosing who will represent the class at the district poetry slam, Nia thinks she has a guaranteed spot on the team. Meanwhile, Raven and Chelsea start a DIY renovation on their new business space.

programme.title: Raven's Home: On Edge
programme.desc: When Mr. Arthur tells Booker that he isn't ready to go from sweeping floors to cutting hair at the barbershop, Booker opens his own mobile barbershop in the boys' school bathroom.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Video-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv and her band mates are stumped and can't agree on a theme for their new music video. They enlist Parker to shoot the video with his new camera and Diggie enthusiastically signs on to join his crew.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Champ-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie is getting ready to leave for Australia when he realizes he wants to get back together with Maddie. He isn't sure she feels the same. Diggie tries to talk with her, but she's swamped with the team winning the state championship.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Diners and Daters
programme.desc: Trish gets a job at a diner, the gang goes for lunch and Austin instantly falls for one of the waitresses. She tells him she doesn't have time to date, so Austin gets a job at the diner to win her over. Dez continues trying to fend off Mindy's attention.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Successes & Setbacks
programme.desc: The gang stays up all night rehearsing for Austin's demo record with Jimmy Starr, but when Austin pushes it too hard, he strains his vocal cords. Ally, Trish and Dez take him to the doctor where he is faced with a choice that could affect his future.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Desperada
programme.desc: Jagged Stones guitarist Vivica gets akumatized into Desperada. Armed with her evil guitar, she wants to punish Jagged Stone for firing her.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Great Aunt-Venture
programme.desc: When Sofia is stuck spending the day with her dotty Aunt Tilly, she learns that there's a lot more to Tilly than meets the eye.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Baker King
programme.desc: Sofia shows King Roland why it is important for him to be the King.

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound

programme.title: Bluey: Wagon Ride / Taxi / The Beach
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo take a wagon ride with their Dad to the park; Bluey has a taxi service with her Dad as her first passenger; Bluey tries to catch up to her Mum on the beach.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Mission to the Moon / Say Cheese
programme.desc: A baby wolf longs to see the moon, so Pip and Freddy embark on a mission to make her dream come true. During photo day, JP entrusts a photo-ready Lucky to Pip and Freddy’s care.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Bluey: Bob Bilby / Spygame / Takeaway
programme.desc: Bingo brings home a Bob Bilby puppet; Bluey and Bingo play a spy game in the park; Bluey and her family have to wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.desc: Mickey Mouse finds himself in silly situations around the world.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sandboy
programme.desc: Marinette finds out that a mysterious supervillain is bringing the Parisian's bad dreams.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Catalyst (Heroes' Day, Part 1)
programme.desc: It's Heroes' Day in Paris and everyone must do a good deed for the occasion. But the day turns into a nightmare when Hawk Moth akumatizes Nathalie into Catalyst.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.desc: Bill and Nancy prep a special harvest dinner, while Cricket and Gramma race Tilly to get a missing ingredient. At the community center, Tilly trains to become a winner.

programme.desc: Ross and the kids are determined to make the Kikiwaka lobster festival great.

programme.desc: Matteo and Finn find a strange collection of bones that they think is from a new species.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Oh Father, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Nia is excited Devon is going to fly in for her school's daddy/ daughter dance.

programme.desc: Booker sets out to land the starring role in the school's musical. Raven encourages him, however he needs Tess' help as the part involves basketball and rap, but he refuses her help because she's a girl.

programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Washington Journal

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Snapped: Lucille Duncan
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in the woods, authorities ask if he's the victim of revenge from an ex-girlfriend, her over-protective brother or her 14-year-old son.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Williamson
programme.desc: A deadly shooting raises questions about an elderly man's business dealings and his friendship with a much younger woman.

programme.title: Snapped: Misook Wang
programme.desc: While a community searches for a missing businesswoman, police uncover a shocking dispute with a money-hungry relative that they hope will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitney Harris
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend’s murderous plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Inside the Episode: Anne Throneberry
programme.desc: Every story has behind-the-scenes facts, insights, and often jaw-dropping allegations that we wish we had time to share on television. Well, now we can. This special episode features details about these investigations never before seen on 'Snapped.'

programme.title: Snapped: Diane Staudte
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother’s love.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Bathtub Mystery
programme.desc: She was a beaming bride. It was a haunting death. Sarah and Ryan were newlyweds when she drowned in the bathtub. Did she die of natural causes or was it deliberate? It took three trials to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Return to Manitowoc County
programme.desc: It's a gripping case that defies easy answers and Dateline has been following it for more than a decade. At the center, Steven Avery. He and his nephew were convicted of killing Teresa Halbach.

programme.title: The Jane Doe Murders
programme.desc: In September 1996, a murdered woman is discovered in the Oregon woods- Polk County Jane Doe. For 24 years, she remains unidentified until former Las Vegas PD CSI, Yolanda McClary, identifies her, prompting a detective to investigate the murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Graham
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter is left for dead after a vicious murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Fenton
programme.desc: A woman finds her husband dead and proclaims her innocence, but questions about his wealth, a suspicious fire and her scandalous past raise red flags.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in Seattle
programme.desc: Nicole Pietz was a well-liked fitness executive married to the man of her dreams. Then one night, she didn't show up for dinner with her husband and friends.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Against All Odds
programme.desc: It was a crime not even police could believe: A toddler was shot in the head and left for dead. Despite the odds, she stunned everyone with her will to survive while a detective vowed to crack this case, no matter how long it took.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Debbie Hawk
programme.desc: When Debbie Hawk vanished, her friends and family were left searching for answers. Investigators discovered that before she went missing, Debbie planned to reveal secrets. Police wondered if silencing her was a motive for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Justice for Bonnie
programme.desc: When Bonnie Craig was found dead, police collected DNA but it didn't match anyone in the system. Then, twelve years later, there was a hit but the man was thousands of miles away. Turns out, prosecutors would need more than DNA to convict a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Sting
programme.desc: Newlywed Dalia Dippolito returned home from the gym to the awful news that her husband had been killed. In a case where almost nothing was as it seemed, investigators wanted to know: Was Dalia diabolical or an unwitting pawn in a hoax gone wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.title: Movie: Interstellar
programme.desc: A group of scientists and explorers embarks on a voyage through a wormhole, traveling vast distances through space. One member of the expedition, a widowed engineer, must decide to leave his two children behind for the sake of the human race.

programme.title: Movie: 300
programme.desc: When a massive army sweeps into his land, Sparta's King Leonidas assembles a small but dedicated army to go to battle against the Persians.

programme.title: Movie: 300: Rise of an Empire
programme.desc: An account of the second Persian invasion of Greece in 480-479 BC. A Greek general attempts to unite all of Greece by leading an attack against the invading Persian army led by an immortal and the vengeful commander of the Persian army.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: P.T.A It Ain't So
programme.desc: Linda attempts to become more involved with the P.T.A., inspired by its seemingly perfect president, Joanne. Meanwhile, Bob tries to cheer up a hardware store owner after unknowingly making a joke about his pet parrot that recently flew away.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yes Without My Zeke
programme.desc: When Zeke gets in trouble, the Belcher kids and Jimmy Jr. pitch in to help prevent him being sent to a disciplinary school. However, Tina tries to thwart their mission, so she can have Jimmy Jr. and his butt all to herself.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Ring (But Not Scary)
programme.desc: Bob's plan to surprise Linda for their anniversary gets tricky when the kids become involved.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Boys Just Wanna Have Fungus

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Motor, She Boat
programme.desc: Tina and Bob participate in the Thundergirls father-daughter cardboard boat race and Tina tries to hide her feelings about Bob’s terrible boat-building skills. Meanwhile, Linda drags Louise and Gene to a fire station open house and overstays her welcome.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Pig Trouble in Little Tina
programme.desc: Tina dissects a fetal pig in science class and things get spooky. Also, Bob and Linda do battle with a giant ball of ear wax.

programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Family Guy: Girl, Internetted
programme.desc: When Meg suddenly becomes internet famous, she and an excited Peter work together to build her following and create content for her new image that revolves around unhealthy eating.

programme.desc: Before Dee's baby arrives, the gang tries to figure out who is the father by throwing a house party for all her former flings.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Hounds From Hell
programme.desc: Pet adoption is a cause close to Cesar's heart, so he lends his support to rescue dog owners being terrorized by hounds from hell.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Why Dogs Fight

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homeboys and Hounds

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pack Leaders in Training

programme.title: Dog: Impossible: House Unrest

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Ice Cave
programme.desc: A strange cave freezes in the summer and melts in the winter, and a massive sand dune swallows a small child in an instant. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate these mysteries of the natural world.

programme.title: BattleBots: Stop! Hammer Time!
programme.desc: Legendary hammer-bot Beta returns to face off with Rotator, one of the deadliest horizontal spinners on the planet. Later, two rising stars attempt to stake their claim in the contest as Gruff pits its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Rookie Rumbles!
programme.desc: Bots collide in an intense and messy main event as End Game takes on Bloodsport. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut, and rookie Slap Box faces the former Giant Nut winner Tombstone in a brutal brawl.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: BattleBots: Mega Fights: Rookie Rumbles!
programme.desc: Bots collide in an intense and messy main event as End Game takes on Bloodsport. Giant walker-bot Chomp makes its debut, and rookie Slap Box faces the former Giant Nut winner Tombstone in a brutal brawl.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan

programme.desc: Legendary hammer-bot Beta returns to face off with Rotator, one of the deadliest horizontal spinners on the planet. Later, two rising stars attempt to stake their claim in the contest as Gruff pits its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: See No Evil: One Chance, One Look
programme.desc: In Tempe, Arizona, millionaire entrepreneur Rick Chance is brutally gunned down in a hotel room. The senseless murder leaves his family heartbroken. To catch the killer, detectives turn to their most reliable witness -- surveillance video.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seen at Susan's
programme.desc: On April 12th 2008, Susan Casey vanishes after a night out. The only clues left behind are suspicious drag marks outside her home. CCTV footage reveals three different suspects on the scene. The police must find out who is lying.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Came Back
programme.desc: When a young mother of two is found brutally murdered at home, suspicion falls on her friends. Detectives zero in on multiple suspects but as each one tells a different story; they don't know who to trust. Surveillance footage may reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Do You Want to Smell Human Blood?
programme.desc: Shelby Weatherly is found brutally stabbed to death by the side of the highway, and investigators struggle to find a suspect. Forensic evidence and reports of a mysterious car lead to revealing images and evidence that point toward the vicious killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: More Than a Statistic
programme.desc: A loving immigrant family is devastated when Sandra Francis is murdered in her Boston apartment. A glut of recent homicides has left police stretched thin, so when the case runs cold, two dedicated cops develop a revolutionary technique to catch a killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Murder in New England
programme.desc: After grandmother Irene Kennedy is found dead in a park, her family is split apart when a distant relative is charged with her murder. It will take years, another killing and a jail house snitch to bring the family back together.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Do You Want to Smell Human Blood?
programme.desc: Shelby Weatherly is found brutally stabbed to death by the side of the highway, and investigators struggle to find a suspect. Forensic evidence and reports of a mysterious car lead to revealing images and evidence that point toward the vicious killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: More Than a Statistic
programme.desc: A loving immigrant family is devastated when Sandra Francis is murdered in her Boston apartment. A glut of recent homicides has left police stretched thin, so when the case runs cold, two dedicated cops develop a revolutionary technique to catch a killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A 59 year old grandmother is discovered beaten and stabbed to death in her home on Mother's Day.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Lethal Misconduct
programme.desc: A shy Marine wife's loneliness lands her in the centre of a deadly love triangle; a taboo romance blooms, but it leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Prey for Me
programme.desc: In Washington State, a greedy pastor decides that one woman just isn't enough, and fills his odious appetite with the ladies in his congregation. Later, a single mother finds love with a young man carrying a troubled past, only to be torn away by sin.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: A mother is gunned down next to her toddler, sparking a homicide investigation involving passion, kidnapping and intimidation. When cops discover a dictatphone, it leads them on the trail of intimate audio recordings that could prove reveal her killer.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Whispers from the Dead
programme.desc: In Little Falls, Minn., a retiree's peace is shattered by a home break-in, culminating in a gruesome double-homicide. Investigators discover audio recordings of the killings, revealing what really happened and the killer's true motives.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: Dead and Deleted
programme.desc: A mom of 3 in Georgia is killed after vanishing from home. Vital clues in the form of audio files captured by her tech-obsessed husband may be key to solving the mystery. As cops scrutinize the sounds, they make a grim discovery that betrays her killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Intent: Forget Me Not
programme.desc: A beloved teenage daughter is missing for a month before being discovered murdered in tranquil La Porte, Indiana. Dogged investigators spend 15 years searching several states, only to find a killer close to home.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Deadly Intent: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A couple is gunned down in their home in the middle of the night. Evidence points to the couple's relatives, sending cops down a path that has dire results for a suspect. Police get the killer, but at a severe cost to everyone associated with the victims.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Death and Taxes
programme.desc: When a successful tax attorney is found strangled to death on his Ft. Pierce, Florida property, detectives scrutinize jealous boyfriends, deadbeat tenants, and delinquent clients on their way to finding their killer.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Knives and Lies
programme.desc: When a well-liked teenage boy is found stabbed to death in his Salt Lake City, UT home, detectives leave no stone unturned in their quest to solve the murder that rocked this normally tranquil town.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Rumors in the Halls
programme.desc: Suspicion lands close to home when 17-year-old prom queen Aquilla Flood is found dead in her bedroom. Her family faces tough questions, while Aquilla's friends point detectives to three young men.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Patriots Rising: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Log Jam

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Wish Come True

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Work continues on the twice done house as the crew finishes the flooring and the kitchen is installed. Mike must take care of a health issue, leaving Sherry and Michael to put the finishing touches on the renovation.
